title: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — a small bug-fix patch

titleLocalized.en: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — a small bug-fix patch
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — 小型修復補丁

body: v0.98.51 is a patch on the v0.98.5 preview: the guided tour and opening splash now appear consistently, the progress overlay shows when you switch or reopen a project, play-test starting values accept true/false and quality names, and the system-UI title/author region opens the Game Info editor.

bodyLocalized.en: v0.98.51 is a patch on the v0.98.5 preview: the guided tour and opening splash now appear consistently, the progress overlay shows when you switch or reopen a project, play-test starting values accept true/false and quality names, and the system-UI title/author region opens the Game Info editor.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98.51 是 v0.98.5 預覽版上的補丁：導覽精靈與開場過場的出現時機更一致、切換或重開專案時會顯示重建進度、試玩起始值可輸入 true/false 與變數名，系統 UI 的標題／作者區點擊會開啟 Game Info 編輯器。

details:
Fixes in v0.98.51:

• Guided tour & opening splash — now appear consistently on first launch and after an update; a patch update no longer replays the tour, while a minor update still does.

• Project reopen progress — switching or reloading a project now shows the rebuild progress overlay for the whole scan, not only on first open.

• Play-test starting state — quality inputs accept text: true/false become booleans, numbers stay numbers, and a name is kept as a reference, instead of silently becoming 0.

• System-UI title/author — clicking the screen-header game title/author region now opens the Game Info (project metadata) editor with title and author fields.

This remains an unsigned developer preview.

detailsLocalized.en:
Fixes in v0.98.51:

• Guided tour & opening splash — now appear consistently on first launch and after an update; a patch update no longer replays the tour, while a minor update still does.

• Project reopen progress — switching or reloading a project now shows the rebuild progress overlay for the whole scan, not only on first open.

• Play-test starting state — quality inputs accept text: true/false become booleans, numbers stay numbers, and a name is kept as a reference, instead of silently becoming 0.

• System-UI title/author — clicking the screen-header game title/author region now opens the Game Info (project metadata) editor with title and author fields.

This remains an unsigned developer preview.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
v0.98.51 修復：

• 導覽精靈與開場過場——首次啟動與更新後出現時機一致；補丁更新不再重播導覽，次版更新仍會。

• 重開專案進度——切換或重載入專案時，重建進度浮層會全程顯示，不再只有第一次開啟才有。

• 試玩起始狀態——品質輸入框接受文字：true/false 轉成布林、數字維持數字、變數名原樣保留，不再被靜默轉成 0。

• 系統 UI 標題／作者——點擊標頭的遊戲標題／作者區，會開啟 Game Info（專案資訊）編輯器的標題與作者欄位。

本版仍為未簽署的開發預覽。

notices.title: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — a small bug-fix patch

titleLocalized.en: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — a small bug-fix patch
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: Dendry Mod Studio v0.98.51 — 小型修復補丁

notices.title: v0.98.5 — Home Hub, in-app publishing, dark mode, and a more capable editor

titleLocalized.en: v0.98.5 — Home Hub, in-app publishing, dark mode, and a more capable editor
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98.5 — Home Hub、應用內發布、深色模式，與更有能力的編輯器

notices.body: A full-screen Home Hub with an illustrated What's New panel, publish / update / sync to GitHub from inside the Studio, dark mode, large events about 5x faster, and broader editor coverage of real authoring workflows.

bodyLocalized.en: A full-screen Home Hub with an illustrated What's New panel, publish / update / sync to GitHub from inside the Studio, dark mode, large events about 5x faster, and broader editor coverage of real authoring workflows.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 全螢幕 Home Hub 搭配附圖的 What's New 面板、在 Studio 內發布／更新／同步到 GitHub、深色模式、大型事件開啟約快 5 倍，以及對真實創作流程涵蓋更廣的編輯器。

notices.details:
Key changes in v0.98.5:

• Home Hub — a full-screen home page gathering overview, publishing, announcements, templates, recent projects, and an illustrated What's New panel.

• Broader authoring coverage — a navigable conditional tree with a what-if simulator, a directly editable system-UI sidebar, in-place play-test on the real Dendry engine, and five smaller source-only gaps closed.

• Publish to GitHub — publish, update, and sync from inside the Studio, with a management dashboard and safe retry.

• Dark mode & polish — light / dark / auto, large events open roughly 5x faster, default-collapsed sections, empty / loading / error states with retry, and a persistent back control.

This is still an unsigned preview build. Internal representations may change between versions, so mods edited now are not guaranteed to be forward-compatible. Keep backups and review install plans before applying changes.

detailsLocalized.en:
Key changes in v0.98.5:

• Home Hub — a full-screen home page gathering overview, publishing, announcements, templates, recent projects, and an illustrated What's New panel.

• Broader authoring coverage — a navigable conditional tree with a what-if simulator, a directly editable system-UI sidebar, in-place play-test on the real Dendry engine, and five smaller source-only gaps closed.

• Publish to GitHub — publish, update, and sync from inside the Studio, with a management dashboard and safe retry.

• Dark mode & polish — light / dark / auto, large events open roughly 5x faster, default-collapsed sections, empty / loading / error states with retry, and a persistent back control.

This is still an unsigned preview build. Internal representations may change between versions, so mods edited now are not guaranteed to be forward-compatible. Keep backups and review install plans before applying changes.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
v0.98.5 主要變化：

• Home Hub——全螢幕首頁，整合總覽、發布、公告、範本、最近的專案，以及附圖的 What's New 面板。

• 更廣的創作涵蓋面——可導覽的條件樹搭配 what-if 模擬器、可直接編輯的系統 UI 側欄、用真正的 Dendry 引擎原地試玩，並補上五個原本只能回原始碼處理的較小缺口。

• 發布到 GitHub——在 Studio 內完成發布、更新與同步，附管理儀表板與安全重試。

• 深色模式與打磨——亮／暗／自動三段、大型事件開啟速度約快 5 倍、結構區段預設收合、空／載入／錯誤狀態附重試，以及常駐返回鍵。

這仍是未簽署的預覽版。版本之間內部表示可能變動，因此現在編輯的 mod 不保證向前相容。請保留備份，並在套用修改前檢查 install plan。

notices.title: v0.98.1 — Template Hub, debug panel overhaul, editing improvements

titleLocalized.en: v0.98.1 — Template Hub, debug panel overhaul, editing improvements
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98.1 — 範本中心、偵錯面板全面改版、編輯功能改進

notices.body: Download and manage game templates directly from the Studio. Runtime Preview debug panel rebuilt with typed inputs, grouped variables, pinning, search, and known-value autocomplete. Object Canvas gains route target picker, inline condition editing, and variable picker. Seven cross-mod and cache bugs fixed.

bodyLocalized.en: Download and manage game templates directly from the Studio. Runtime Preview debug panel rebuilt with typed inputs, grouped variables, pinning, search, and known-value autocomplete. Object Canvas gains route target picker, inline condition editing, and variable picker. Seven cross-mod and cache bugs fixed.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 直接在 Studio 內下載和管理遊戲範本。實機預覽偵錯面板全面改版，支援型別輸入、分組變數、固定、搜尋和已知值自動完成。物件編輯器新增路由目標選擇器、內嵌條件編輯和變數選擇器。修復七個跨 Mod 與快取錯誤。

notices.details:
Key changes in v0.98.1:

• Template Hub — browse, download, and manage game template projects from within the Studio. Split asset archives keep large art downloads separate from source updates. Edit detection, backup, and stash-swap rollback protect against data loss.

• Debug panel overhaul — typed inputs (toggle/number/text), variables grouped by meaning, pin and search, known-value autocomplete dropdown for text variables, full zh-Hant/en localization, and fullscreen debug access.

• Object Canvas editing — route target autocomplete with scene search, compound condition structural preview, inline editable condition cards, variable picker for effect cards, and condition remove buttons.

• Bug fixes — cross-mod install plan leak, cross-mod draft workspace leak, storyboard cross-project data pollution, duplicate face-image directives, project cache reliability improvements, stale template index after local edits, and manual index rebuild button.

detailsLocalized.en:
Key changes in v0.98.1:

• Template Hub — browse, download, and manage game template projects from within the Studio. Split asset archives keep large art downloads separate from source updates. Edit detection, backup, and stash-swap rollback protect against data loss.

• Debug panel overhaul — typed inputs (toggle/number/text), variables grouped by meaning, pin and search, known-value autocomplete dropdown for text variables, full zh-Hant/en localization, and fullscreen debug access.

• Object Canvas editing — route target autocomplete with scene search, compound condition structural preview, inline editable condition cards, variable picker for effect cards, and condition remove buttons.

• Bug fixes — cross-mod install plan leak, cross-mod draft workspace leak, storyboard cross-project data pollution, duplicate face-image directives, project cache reliability improvements, stale template index after local edits, and manual index rebuild button.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
v0.98.1 主要變化：

• 範本中心——直接在 Studio 內瀏覽、下載和管理遊戲範本專案。分離式素材壓縮包讓大型美術下載與 source 更新分開。編輯偵測、備份和暫存交換回滾保護資料安全。

• 偵錯面板全面改版——型別化輸入（開關/數字/文字）、按語義分組、固定和搜尋、文字變數已知值自動完成下拉選單、完整繁體中文/英文本地化，以及全螢幕偵錯存取。

• 物件編輯器改進——路由目標自動完成場景搜尋、複合條件結構預覽、可編輯的內嵌條件卡片、效果卡片變數選擇器，以及條件移除按鈕。

• 錯誤修復——跨 Mod 安裝計畫殘留、跨 Mod 草稿工作區洩漏、故事板跨專案資料污染、face-image 指令重複、專案快取可靠性改善、本地編輯後模板索引過期，以及手動重建索引按鈕。

notices.title: v0.98 major feature update is ready

titleLocalized.en: v0.98 major feature update is ready
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98 大型功能更新已可使用

notices.body: Music asset management, Canvas storyboard zoom and card stacking, faster loading, better performance, and improved complex conditional support. Projects from older versions may not load — keep backups.

bodyLocalized.en: Music asset management, Canvas storyboard zoom and card stacking, faster loading, better performance, and improved complex conditional support. Projects from older versions may not load — keep backups.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 新增音樂資產管理、Canvas 故事板縮放與卡牌堆疊、更快載入速度、更好效能，以及更強的複雜條件支援。舊版專案可能無法載入——請保留備份。

notices.details:
This is the largest feature update since the initial preview. Key changes:

• Music asset management — browse, preview, and edit set-music directives with audio modifier badges directly in the Object Canvas and Explore gallery.

• Canvas storyboard improvements — 4-level zoom with Level of Detail that keeps cards readable from 10% bird's-eye to full detail, and drag-to-snap card stacking that lets you organize cards like real playing cards on a desk.

• Performance — faster project indexing and rendering, smoother zoom animation, and reduced memory use during canvas editing.

• Complex conditionals — better support for multi-branch routing states, nested conditions, and conditional route editing in the Route Map and Semantic Logic panels.

⚠️ Breaking change: projects that were edited with v0.97.x or earlier may not load correctly in v0.98. Always keep backups of your source files before updating.

⚠️ This is a large feature update and new bugs are expected. If something breaks, please report it — your feedback directly shapes what gets fixed next.

detailsLocalized.en:
This is the largest feature update since the initial preview. Key changes:

• Music asset management — browse, preview, and edit set-music directives with audio modifier badges directly in the Object Canvas and Explore gallery.

• Canvas storyboard improvements — 4-level zoom with Level of Detail that keeps cards readable from 10% bird's-eye to full detail, and drag-to-snap card stacking that lets you organize cards like real playing cards on a desk.

• Performance — faster project indexing and rendering, smoother zoom animation, and reduced memory use during canvas editing.

• Complex conditionals — better support for multi-branch routing states, nested conditions, and conditional route editing in the Route Map and Semantic Logic panels.

⚠️ Breaking change: projects that were edited with v0.97.x or earlier may not load correctly in v0.98. Always keep backups of your source files before updating.

⚠️ This is a large feature update and new bugs are expected. If something breaks, please report it — your feedback directly shapes what gets fixed next.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
這是自首次預覽以來最大的功能更新。主要變化：

• 音樂資產管理——在 Object Canvas 和 Explore 素材庫中直接瀏覽、預聽和編輯 set-music 指令，搭配音訊修飾符標記。

• Canvas 故事板改進——4 級縮放搭配自動細節層次，從 10% 鳥瞰圖到完整細節都保持卡牌可讀；拖拽磁吸卡牌堆疊讓你像整理桌上撲克牌一樣組織故事卡牌。

• 效能提升——更快的專案索引與渲染、更流暢的縮放動畫、Canvas 編輯時更低的記憶體佔用。

• 複雜條件判斷——Route Map 和 Semantic Logic 面板對多分支路由狀態、巢狀條件和條件路由編輯有更好的支援。

⚠️ 相容性提醒：使用 v0.97.x 或更早版本編輯過的專案可能無法在 v0.98 中正確載入。更新前請務必保留 source 檔案備份。

⚠️ 這是一次大型功能更新，預期會有新的 Bug 出現。如果發現問題，請回報——你的回饋直接決定下一步修什麼。

notices.title: Older projects may need re-indexing

titleLocalized.zh-Hant: 舊專案可能需要重新索引

notices.body: v0.98 changes how Studio reads project structure. If a project edited with v0.97.x fails to load, try re-scanning from the Open Project dialog. If the problem persists, please report it with the project name and error message.

bodyLocalized.en: v0.98 changes how Studio reads project structure. If a project edited with v0.97.x fails to load, try re-scanning from the Open Project dialog. If the problem persists, please report it with the project name and error message.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98 變更了 Studio 讀取專案結構的方式。如果以 v0.97.x 編輯過的專案無法載入，請嘗試從「開啟專案」對話框重新掃描。如果問題持續，請附上專案名稱和錯誤訊息回報。

notices.details:
The project indexer and model layer were updated to support music directives and new canvas features. Most existing projects should load without issues, but edge cases involving custom scheduler wiring or unusual event structures may need a fresh scan.

If re-scanning doesn't help, please open a GitHub Issue with the project name, the error message or screenshot, and your Studio version.

detailsLocalized.en:
The project indexer and model layer were updated to support music directives and new canvas features. Most existing projects should load without issues, but edge cases involving custom scheduler wiring or unusual event structures may need a fresh scan.

If re-scanning doesn't help, please open a GitHub Issue with the project name, the error message or screenshot, and your Studio version.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
專案索引器和模型層為了支援音樂指令與新 Canvas 功能而更新。大多數現有專案應該能正常載入，但涉及自訂排程接線或不尋常事件結構的邊界情況可能需要重新掃描。

如果重新掃描後問題仍在，請在 GitHub Issues 中附上專案名稱、錯誤訊息或截圖，以及你的 Studio 版本。

notices.title: Expect more bugs after this update

titleLocalized.en: Expect more bugs after this update
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: 本次更新後預期會有更多 Bug

notices.body: This is the largest single feature update so far. New code paths in music editing, Canvas stacking, and the performance rewrite have not yet been battle-tested by real mod projects. Please report anything broken — it helps enormously.

bodyLocalized.en: This is the largest single feature update so far. New code paths in music editing, Canvas stacking, and the performance rewrite have not yet been battle-tested by real mod projects. Please report anything broken — it helps enormously.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 這是目前為止最大的單次功能更新。音樂編輯、Canvas 堆疊和效能重寫中的新程式碼路徑尚未經過真實 Mod 專案的實戰測試。請回報任何故障——這對開發有極大幫助。

notices.details:
Areas most likely to have new bugs:

• Music directive editing — the audio player, modifier badges, and set-music draft fields are brand new.

• Canvas card stacking — group drag, snap detection, and z-index ordering handle many edge cases but have not been tested with large real-world storyboards.

• LOD zoom — the Level of Detail system dynamically changes font sizes and hides content layers. Text may occasionally appear blurry during rapid zoom on older hardware.

• Shell navigation — mode switching was refactored into a separate module. If tab switching behaves unexpectedly, please report it.

The most helpful report includes your Studio version, OS, the project or mod name, what you tried, what you expected, and what actually happened. Screenshots and source paths make bugs much easier to reproduce.

detailsLocalized.en:
Areas most likely to have new bugs:

• Music directive editing — the audio player, modifier badges, and set-music draft fields are brand new.

• Canvas card stacking — group drag, snap detection, and z-index ordering handle many edge cases but have not been tested with large real-world storyboards.

• LOD zoom — the Level of Detail system dynamically changes font sizes and hides content layers. Text may occasionally appear blurry during rapid zoom on older hardware.

• Shell navigation — mode switching was refactored into a separate module. If tab switching behaves unexpectedly, please report it.

The most helpful report includes your Studio version, OS, the project or mod name, what you tried, what you expected, and what actually happened. Screenshots and source paths make bugs much easier to reproduce.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant:
最可能出現新 Bug 的區域：

• 音樂指令編輯——音訊播放器、修飾符標記和 set-music 草稿欄位都是全新的。

• Canvas 卡牌堆疊——群組拖動、磁吸偵測和 z-index 排序處理了許多邊界情況，但尚未在大型真實故事板上測試。

• LOD 縮放——細節層次系統會動態改變字體大小並隱藏內容層。在較舊硬體上快速縮放時，文字偶爾可能模糊。

• Shell 導航——模式切換被重構到獨立模組。如果分頁切換行為異常，請回報。

最有幫助的回報會包含 Studio 版本、作業系統、專案或 Mod 名稱、你嘗試了什麼、原本期待什麼，以及實際發生了什麼。截圖和 source 路徑能讓 Bug 更容易被重現。

notices.title: Trying a real mod? Please tell me where it breaks.

titleLocalized.en: Trying a real mod? Please tell me where it breaks.
titleLocalized.zh-Hant: 正在測試真實 Mod？歡迎告訴我哪裡壞了。

notices.body: The most useful v0.98 feedback is about real editing flows: loading older projects, music directive editing, Canvas zoom and card stacking, complex event conditionals, Review & Apply, and Runtime Preview.

bodyLocalized.en: The most useful v0.98 feedback is about real editing flows: loading older projects, music directive editing, Canvas zoom and card stacking, complex event conditionals, Review & Apply, and Runtime Preview.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: v0.98 最需要的回饋是真實編輯流程：載入舊專案、音樂指令編輯、Canvas 縮放與卡牌堆疊、複雜事件條件判斷、審查與套用，以及 Runtime Preview。

notices.details: Screenshots are very helpful for layout or preview problems. For editing bugs, source paths and the generated install plan are even better because they make the issue reproducible.

detailsLocalized.en: Screenshots are very helpful for layout or preview problems. For editing bugs, source paths and the generated install plan are even better because they make the issue reproducible.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 如果是版面或預覽問題，截圖很有幫助。如果是編輯錯誤，source 路徑和生成的 install plan 更有價值，因為它們能讓問題被重現。

notices.title: Report a problem
notices.body: Use GitHub Issues when Studio crashes, fails to load a project, applies a confusing plan, parses an event incorrectly, or produces a broken preview.

bodyLocalized.en: Use GitHub Issues when Studio crashes, fails to load a project, applies a confusing plan, parses an event incorrectly, or produces a broken preview.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 當 Studio 當機、無法載入專案、產生難以理解的套用計畫、錯誤解析事件，或做出破損預覽時，請使用 GitHub Issues 回報。

notices.details: A good bug report includes your operating system, Studio version, whether you used browser or desktop mode, the project or mod name, the exact action, and any diagnostics or error text shown by Studio.

detailsLocalized.en: A good bug report includes your operating system, Studio version, whether you used browser or desktop mode, the project or mod name, the exact action, and any diagnostics or error text shown by Studio.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 好的問題回報會包含：作業系統、Studio 版本、使用瀏覽器或桌面模式、專案或 Mod 名稱、實際操作步驟，以及 Studio 顯示的診斷或錯誤文字。

notices.title: Request a feature
notices.body: Open a feature request when you find a missing editor surface, workflow shortcut, or compatibility need.

bodyLocalized.en: Open a feature request when you find a missing editor surface, workflow shortcut, or compatibility need.
bodyLocalized.zh-Hant: 如果你發現缺少編輯介面、流程捷徑或相容性需求，可以提出功能需求。

notices.details: Feature requests are most useful when they describe the source pattern you are editing, what Studio already detects, and what the smallest safe workflow should do.

detailsLocalized.en: Feature requests are most useful when they describe the source pattern you are editing, what Studio already detects, and what the smallest safe workflow should do.
detailsLocalized.zh-Hant: 功能需求若能描述你正在修改的 source 慣例、Studio 目前已能偵測的內容，以及最小安全流程應該做什麼，會最有幫助。
